title: Daan Pite Chele
overview: Daan Pite Chele (also known as Danpite Chhele, translating to "The Mischievous Boy" or "The Bad Lad") is a highly celebrated, classic Bangladeshi children's film. Directed by the legendary Khan Ataur Rahman and based on a story by prominent author Makbula Manzoor, it remains a landmark movie in the history of Bangladesh's cinema for children and youth.
